highlights.text: My general lean is ES can do more back-testing.
My general lean is to defer to the trend.
I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend though.
My core setup: The Failed Breakdown.
Failed Breakdowns are the footprint of institutional accumulation and occur when ES goes elevator down, flushes a low.
I wrote on Friday at 4pm: “Bulls attempted a recovery though today by putting in a big Failed Breakdown of 6540-42, and building a base.
Perhaps dip there, then onto 6824, then 6850.” We saw exactly this yesterday: At 9:40AM, we flushed 6701 to 6675, trapped below, Failed Breakdown, and recovered.
The task for bulls today was to clear it and head to 6851 which is the magnet for this leg up.
As long as ES holds 6751 the parabola continues with 6802, 6816, 6831, then 6851 next target slate.” We got right to work on this, hitting ~6851 by noon today.

post_title: The Thanksgiving Week Rally Paid 300 Points in SPX. Is The Rally Done? Nov 27/28 Plan
